description: Fixed prompts for CAD LLM OpenSCAD compile evaluation (Phase 0).

prompts.prompt: Create a parametric 20mm cube with OpenSCAD Customizer section Dimensions.
Parametric box with removable lid, 80x50x30mm outer, 2mm wall thickness.
Phone stand with adjustable angle variable and stable base, printable on FDM.
L-bracket with mounting holes for M3 screws, parametric leg lengths.
Parametric flat washer with inner and outer diameter variables, 2mm thick.
Cylindrical spacer with parametric height and inner bore for M4 bolt, 3mm wall.
Wall hook with parametric depth and hook radius, minimum 3mm thickness for FDM.
Electronics enclosure base tray 100x60x20mm with 2.4mm walls and corner screw bosses.
